# Freyr Technology AI

Freyr Technology AI is an AI infrastructure and model API service company. The public website currently presents model pricing, privacy information, and terms of use.

Key pages:

- Pricing: https://www.token-exchange-ai.com/pricing.html
- Privacy Policy: https://www.token-exchange-ai.com/privacy.html
- Terms of Use: https://www.token-exchange-ai.com/terms.html

Machine-readable resources:

- Model category configuration: https://www.token-exchange-ai.com/config/model-categories.js
- Model catalog fallback: https://www.token-exchange-ai.com/assets/models.json
- Sitemap: https://www.token-exchange-ai.com/sitemap.xml

Pricing notes:

- Public model categories are text, image, music, and video.
- Token pricing is shown for text models only when the API returns a positive token cost.
- Zero or unavailable token prices are displayed as `Negotiable`.
